headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Exciting Potential
summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.

raw.headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Exciting Potential
raw.summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.

headline: FSLR Q1 Deep Dive: Technology Launch and Policy Uncertainty Shape Outlook
summary: Solar panel manufacturer First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 23.6% year on year to $1.04 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $5.05 billion at the midpoint came in 3.2% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.22 per share was 13.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
